user.title: ISEO Argo BLE Lock
user.description: Select your lock from the list of nearby ISEO locks, sorted by signal strength. If your lock is not listed, make sure it is powered on and within Bluetooth range, then click Submit to scan again.

bluetooth_confirm.title: ISEO Lock Discovered
bluetooth_confirm.description:
Found a new ISEO lock nearby: **{name}**.

Click **Submit** to begin setup.

show_uuid.title: Add to Argo App
show_uuid.description:
Add the following UUID as a new Bluetooth user in the Argo app:

`{uuid}`

1. Open the **Argo app**, tap your lock, then go to **Users → + → Phone with ARGO UID**
2. Enter a name (e.g. *Home Assistant*), paste the UUID above, then tap **Save**
3. Tap the new user and enable **Login** — this is **required** for the integration to authenticate
4. Enable **VIP** (strongly recommended) — VIP users are never blocked by time profiles, passage mode, or other access restrictions

⚠️ **The next step will open the lock.** Once you have completed the steps above, click **Submit**.

enroll.title: Enroll & Activate
enroll.description:
⚠️ **The lock is about to open.**

Clicking **Submit** will send an open command to the lock. The bolt will retract briefly — this activates the new user account and stores the credentials on the lock.

Make sure it is safe to open the door right now, then click **Submit**.

verify_permissions.title: Verify Permissions
verify_permissions.description:
The permission check failed. Fix the issue shown below, then click **Submit** to retry.

> ℹ️ **The door will not open again** during this check.

error.no_devices_found: No ISEO locks found nearby. Make sure the lock is powered on and within Bluetooth range, then click Submit to scan again.
error.login_permission_missing: Could not verify account. Make sure the UUID is added as a user in the Argo app and that the Login permission is enabled.
error.user_not_found: This UUID was not found in the lock's whitelist. Please add it in the Argo app and try again.
error.auth_failed: The lock rejected the request. Make sure the account was set up correctly in the Argo app.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the lock. Check it is powered on and within Bluetooth range.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.not_iseo_device: This device does not appear to be an ISEO lock.

init.title: Link Argo Users to Home Assistant
init.description: Select the Home Assistant account for each Argo user below. Leave a field blank to keep those events anonymous. {count} Bluetooth user(s) found.
